name: sg
description: Multi-agent VS Code extension: Jira + Copilot + GitHub Enterprise.

sg.jira.token.description: Jira API token / PAT. Used as Bearer by default, or as the password part for Basic auth.

sg.jira.user.description: Optional Jira username/email for Basic auth. If set and sg.jira.authType=auto, Basic auth is used.

sg.jira.authType.description: Jira auth scheme. auto = Basic when sg.jira.user is set (or token looks like user:token), otherwise Bearer.

sg.github.url.description: GitHub Enterprise base URL (e.g. https://ghe.example.com). API = {url}/api/v3

sg.github.token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token. Sent as token auth.

sg.analyze.largeThreshold.description: Threshold (issue count) above which analyze-dynamic asks for confirmation before fetching all matching issues.

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read and explain a Jira ticket

commands.name: analyze-dynamic
commands.description: Dynamic analysis with natural language filters + visual report

commands.name: push
commands.description: Push last committed branch and create PR
